tickets.csatFeedback: Incredibly fast response! Alice identified the network issue immediately and fixed the connection block. Kudos!
tickets.title: Database connection timeout in prod
tickets.description: Our analytics server is failing to resolve the primary DB shard. Getting a continuous timeout error since 3 PM.

tickets.csatFeedback: Refund processed successfully, took a couple of days but billing support was polite.
tickets.title: Requesting refund for double charge in May
tickets.description: I was billed twice on May 15th for the pro plan subscription. I have attached my bank transaction receipt.

tickets.csatFeedback: They resolved it and unlocked my account, but it took way too long (almost 30 hours) for an administrative block.
tickets.title: Locked out of main admin console
tickets.description: My password was reset but I am not receiving the email link to update it. We cannot access our console.

tickets.csatFeedback: Easy explanation, Diana showed me exactly where the CSV export endpoint is. Thanks!
tickets.title: How do I export historical ticket records?
tickets.description: We need to move our last quarter tickets into CSV to load into Tableau. Where is the export option?

tickets.title: Image uploads fail with error 413 on mobile
tickets.description: Mobile users cannot upload attachment screenshots larger than 2MB. Getting Payload Too Large server errors.

tickets.title: Enterprise subscription renewal fails
tickets.description: Our company credit card was rejected. We need to pay by wire transfer or generate an official invoice invoice before our service is cut off.

tickets.title: Request to set up SSO / SAML for team
tickets.description: We are onboarding 50 new hires next week and urgently need to configure Okta SSO. We submitted this 2 days ago.

tickets.title: Is there a Dark Mode for the main support portal?
tickets.description: Our team is working late shifts, a dark theme would help save our eyes. Is there a toggle or custom stylesheet?

tickets.csatFeedback: Alice explained how the signature hashing changed in the API update. Works great now!
tickets.title: Webhook callbacks failing with signature mismatch
tickets.description: We updated our client integration and now our callback validations fail. Are webhooks sending the correct hash?

tickets.csatFeedback: They charged me when they should not have. Unacceptable service.
tickets.title: Charged after subscription cancellation
tickets.description: I cancelled my account last month and was still charged $29 today. Please refund and close my account permanently.

tickets.csatFeedback: Charlie resolved this in record time, amazing!
tickets.title: Locked out of account - reset code not arriving
tickets.description: I cannot login to my account. I requested a password reset code but it has not arrived in my email inbox after 15 minutes.
